input.context: Adapt the Org Singularity onboarding kit into the simplest-possible 4-week group-coaching onboarding for new OpenExO Pro members (oexo-pro-onboarding): Day-1 full platform access, observe-only Pro/10xShift/Keynote calls during onboarding, single onboarding coach until graduation, monthly first-Monday cohorts, drop into full Pro.

output.summary: Grounded the onboarding in the OpenExO Pro / ExO 3.0 ecosystem from openexo.com/join-pro: Weekly Implementation Masterminds (Kent+Kevin), Monthly Strategic Keynote (Salim), 10xShift calls, AI-X Companion, ExQ Assessment, ExO Canvas, DRIVE Scorecard, SHAPE Diagnostic, REWRITE Playbook, MTP; $720/mo; first-Monday monthly cohorts; $500K+/under-50 ICP.
